cmd:
set -eu
BB=/var/lib/easyenclave/bin/busybox
ROOT=/tmp/oracle-readonly
$BB mkdir -p "$ROOT"
$BB httpd -f -p 0.0.0.0:8082 -h "$ROOT" &
tick=0
while :; do tick=$((tick + 1)); ts=$($BB date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ); printf '{"ok":true,"oracle":"oracle-readonly","recommendation":"ok","integrity":"read_only","tick":%s,"ts":"%s"}\n' "$tick" "$ts" > "$ROOT/oracle.json"; echo "oracle-readonly: tick=$tick ts=$ts status=ok"; $BB sleep 10; done
